question: How many customers are there?
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_customers FROM customers;

question: Show the top 5 customers by total spending.
sql: SELECT TOP 5 c.customer_id, c.customer_name, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS total_spending FROM customers c JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id GROUP BY c.customer_id, c.customer_name ORDER BY total_spending DESC;

question: What is the total revenue?
sql: SELECT SUM(quantity * unit_price) AS total_revenue FROM order_items;

question: Show the top 10 best selling products.
sql: SELECT TOP 10 p.product_id, p.product_name, SUM(oi.quantity) AS total_quantity FROM products p JOIN order_items oi ON p.product_id = oi.product_id GROUP BY p.product_id, p.product_name ORDER BY total_quantity DESC;

question: Which customer placed the most orders?
sql: SELECT TOP 1 c.customer_id, c.customer_name, COUNT(o.order_id) AS total_orders FROM customers c JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id GROUP BY c.customer_id, c.customer_name ORDER BY total_orders DESC;

question: Which marketing campaign has the highest conversion rate?
sql: SELECT TOP 1 c.campaign_id, c.campaign_name, AVG(cc.conversion_rate) AS conversion_rate FROM campaigns c JOIN campaign_conversions cc ON c.campaign_id = cc.campaign_id GROUP BY c.campaign_id, c.campaign_name ORDER BY conversion_rate DESC;

question: How many support tickets are open?
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS open_tickets FROM support_tickets WHERE status = 'Open';

question: Show the latest 20 orders.
sql: SELECT TOP 20 * FROM orders ORDER BY order_date DESC;
